title: Move the sandbox plug to the top of endpoint.ex
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/liveview_endpoint.ex` has the `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox` plug placed AFTER other plugs (after `Plug.Session`). Rewrite to `lib/my_app_web/endpoint.ex` with the sandbox plug as the FIRST plug (immediately after the `@session_options` module attribute and before `socket`, Plug.Static, and all other plugs). Preserve all other plugs in their original order.
tier_rationale: Positional fix — requires understanding of plug pipeline order semantics.
research_citation: "It's important that this is at the top of `endpoint.ex`, before any other plugs." — Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox docs
